MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order to Arbitrate or in the alternative to Extend the Arbitrator's jurisdiction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion extending the Arbitrator's jurisdiction is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 3/30/2004. The OSC is re-set to 4/15/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212.
